overall.description: First-person exploration through a vibrant cyberpunk city district in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic architecture with holographic advertisements, and dense urban atmosphere. The character walks through intersections, narrow streets, and plazas while observing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

turns right from crosswalk onto narrower city street

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and turning right onto a narrower street alongside the teal circular building

multi-story building with red accent panels and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection with a prominent teal circular building featuring neon signage. The character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while a futuristic vehicle passes by, then turns right onto a narrower street lined with red and teal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city street with parked vehicles and elevated highway approach

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles drive past on the narrow street
approaching covered area beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow street between tall buildings, staying on the right sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark van driving toward camera then passing by on the left

teal-colored outdoor escalator leading up to the elevated walkway
futuristic vehicles parked along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow street flanked by the red building on the left and the teal building on the right, with several futuristic cars driving past. The character approaches an elevated highway overpass with visible escalators, transitioning into a more enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath overpass transitioning to open plaza

events.description: passing under the elevated highway into shadowed area then emerging into sunlight
exiting the covered street into an open plaza with the Caliente restaurant visible

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and emerging into a sunlit plaza area with palm trees

entered.detail: building with large purple cat face mural and orange roof structure
building with large orange CALIENTE neon signage and teal facade
tall palm tree visible against the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the elevated highway overpass through a shadowed corridor, then emerges into a brighter plaza area. A distinctive building with a large purple cat mural dominates the view, while the Caliente restaurant sign becomes visible in the distance alongside palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with restaurant and pedestrian crossing

events.description: turns right at the plaza corner to follow the sidewalk alongside Caliente restaurant
crossing a small street at the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past pedestrians and turning right along the sidewalk next to the Caliente restaurant

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: open paved pedestrian area with benches and street furniture
small building with blue lower facade and steam vent

segments.scene_description: Walking through the sunlit plaza area with moderate pedestrian activity, passing by the prominent Caliente restaurant on the left. The character turns right at the corner, moving from the open plaza onto a narrower sidewalk with shop fronts visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: entering area with dense neon signage including Fujitsuki and Bad Shack signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk passing various pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in blue vest walking ahead carrying a bag

entered.detail: large red neon sign with Japanese characters reading FUJITSUKI
orange neon TURBO signage on building facade
building facade with horizontal blue neon light strips
red neon sign reading BAD SHACK on building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow commercial street lined with vibrant neon signs including Fujitsuki and Bad Shack. The character walks alongside other pedestrians on the sidewalk, passing by buildings with blue neon accents and various storefronts in the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban intersection into the dense, neon-saturated corridors of a cyberpunk district. It begins by crossing a sunlit street past a teal circular building and futuristic vehicles before turning right into a narrower passage flanked by red and teal architecture. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from the open road into a shadowed urban canyon beneath an elevated highway overpass, eventually emerging into a bright plaza featuring a large purple cat mural and palm trees. The scene then expands past the Caliente restaurant before turning right at a corner, transitioning from the open plaza back onto a confined sidewalk. Finally, the camera glides through a narrow commercial street where the lighting becomes dominated by vibrant blue neon accents and glowing signs for Fujitsuki and Bad Shack.
